evals.prompt: I'm on Scandit SDK v6 and need to migrate my SparkScan to v7. Here's my scanner file: scanner-v6.ts
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, applies the 6→7 renames and removes deprecated properties in scanner-v6.ts, and summarizes all changes made.

assertions.text: isTorchControlVisible is present in the output file
isTorchButtonVisible is NOT present in the output file
triggerButtonTintColor is present in the output file
captureButtonTintColor is NOT present in the output file
captureButtonBackgroundColor is NOT present in the output file
isBarcodeFindButtonVisible is present in the output file
isFastFindButtonVisible is NOT present in the output file

Removed properties (isHandModeButtonVisible, isSoundModeButtonVisible, isHapticModeButtonVisible, shouldShowScanAreaGuides, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor, defaultHandMode, stopCapturingText, startCapturingText, resumeCapturingText, scanningCapturingText) are NOT present
Import statements use scoped packages (@scandit/web-datacapture-barcode, @scandit/web-datacapture-core) instead of unscoped (scandit-web-datacapture-*)
libraryLocation path is updated from build/engine to sdc-lib
triggerButtonCollapsedColor, triggerButtonExpandedColor, and triggerButtonAnimationColor are present (replacement for captureButtonBackgroundColor)
A summary is present describing changes

evals.prompt: We're upgrading our app from Scandit SDK 7 to 8. Here's our SparkScan file: scanner-v7.ts. Please apply any necessary changes.
evals.expected_output: The skill replaces configure() + DataCaptureContext.create() with DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey() and updates the context reference.

assertions.text: configure( is NOT present in the output file
DataCaptureContext.create() is NOT present in the output file
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is present in the output file
libraryLocation and moduleLoaders are passed as options to forLicenseKey
DataCaptureContext.sharedInstance is used where the old context variable was referenced
A summary is present describing the initialization change

evals.prompt: We need to upgrade our SparkScan integration from SDK 6 all the way to v8. Here's our current code: scanner-v6.ts
evals.expected_output: The skill applies both migrations in order (6→7 then 7→8) and summarizes all changes organized by migration step.

assertions.text: isTorchControlVisible is present (6→7 rename applied)
isTorchButtonVisible is NOT present
Removed v6 properties (isHandModeButtonVisible, isSoundModeButtonVisible, isHapticModeButtonVisible, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor) are NOT present
Import statements use scoped packages (@scandit/web-datacapture-*) instead of unscoped
configure() and DataCaptureContext.create() are replaced with DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey() (7→8 change)
Summary covers both migration steps (references both 6→7 and 7→8)

evals.prompt: I want to upgrade my SparkScan to the latest Scandit SDK version. Here's my code and package.json.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads package.json to detect v6.28.1, determines the target is v8, applies both migrations without asking the user for their version.

assertions.text: Summary mentions the detected version (6.28.1 or v6)
isTorchButtonVisible is NOT present (6→7 rename applied)
isTorchControlVisible is present
Removed v6 properties (isHandModeButtonVisible, isSoundModeButtonVisible, isHapticModeButtonVisible, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor) are NOT present
Import statements use scoped packages (@scandit/web-datacapture-*) instead of unscoped
configure() and DataCaptureContext.create() are replaced with DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey()
Do not ask the user for their version — proceeded autonomously using package.json
